entries.summary: End-to-end integration wiring for Document Q&A SPA — connected ChatPage to RAGOrchestrator (browser-local mode) and SSE streaming (API mode), wired DocumentsPage to search indexes, added service initialization infrastructure, removed dead code, fixed production build issues (edgevec WASM, pdfjs imports), verified full build passes. 7 tasks, all gates passed.
lessons_learned: edgevec npm package has incorrect import API — default export is __wbg_init (init fn), not EdgeVec class. Named exports are the classes.
edgevec WASM snippets directory is not included in npm package — Vite needs a plugin to stub IndexedDbBackend with static read/write methods
pdfjs-dist doesn't export PasswordException as a named export — use message-based detection instead of instanceof
useCallback deps must include mode/serverUrl when handleSend branches on them — empty [] creates stale closures
TokenStreamManager onDone/onError callbacks need streamManager identity guard to prevent race conditions from overlapping streams
